name: Context Menu
title: Context Menu
intro: Pressing the right mouse button opens the context menu.

paragraphs: Close Closes the active file. If you have changed the displayed file and not yet saved the changes, you are asked whether the changes are to be saved.
Close All But This Closes all files except the active one. If you have changed files and not yet saved the changes, you are asked whether the changes are to be saved for each individual program.

New Horizontal Tab Group Creates a new horizontal group. Individual pages and additional groups are displayed horizontally. If a vertical group was created previously, this menu command is not available.
New Vertical Tab Group Creates a new vertical group. Individual pages and additional groups are displayed vertically. If a horizontal group was created previously, this menu command is not available.
Move to Previous/Next Tab Group Shifts an individual page to the next/previous group.
Paste Adds the contents of the clipboard to the panel, provided that they are valid controls.
Select All Selects all controls on the panel.
Properties Opens the Properties Window.
Depending on the control the following commands are available:
Cut Cuts the selected control and transfers it to the clipboard.
Copy Copies the selected control to the clipboard.
Paste Adds the contents of the clipboard to the panel, provided that they are valid controls.
Delete Deletes the selected control.
Properties Opens the Properties Window.
Align
Make Same Size
Horizontal Spacing
Vertical Spacing
Center in Form
Order
Attach Signal Opens the Symbol Selection dialog, to assign a signal to the selected control.
Attach Environment Variable Opens the Symbol Selection dialog, to assign a environment variable to the selected control.
Attach System Variable Opens the Symbol Selection dialog, to assign a system variable to the selected control.
Attach Diagnostic Parameter Opens the Symbol Selection dialog, to assign a diagnostic parameter to the selected control.
Attach Service Signal Opens the Symbol Selection dialog, to assign a service signal to the selected control.
Detach Symbol Removes a symbol assignment.
Detach all Symbols Removes all symbol assignments.
Detach selected Symbols Removes selected symbol assignments.
Reset Values Resets the initialization values of all selected controls to the values from the database.
